questions.context_sentence: Yellowknife (population about 19,000) is right at the top of Canada.
questions.hint: 泡泡(pop)人(u)民拉(la)扯产生人口数量(population)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 黄刀镇（人口约19,000人）就在加拿大的最北部。

questions.context_sentence: There's also a good sports centre too.
questions.hint: 做运动(sports)的活动中心(centre)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 还有一个很好的体育中心。

questions.context_sentence: He's going to work for a diamond company there.
questions.hint: 呆呆(dia)的人买梦(mond)幻般的钻石。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: He's going to work for a ____ company there. (提示: 钻石)
questions.cn: 他要在那里的一家钻石公司工作。

questions.context_sentence: Yellowknife doesn't have skyscrapers, but Dubai has zillions.
questions.hint: 直插天空(sky)擦碰(scrape)云彩的大楼(skyscraper)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 黄刀镇没有摩天大楼，但迪拜有无数座。

questions.context_sentence: See some tennis at the stadium or football at the football stadium.
questions.hint: 踢足球(football)的体育场馆(stadium)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 去体育场看网球，或者去足球场看足球。

questions.context_sentence: Annie's relatives want to see the castle.
questions.hint: 阿姨和叔叔都是我们的亲戚(relative)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 安妮的亲戚想要看城堡。

questions.context_sentence: I need to send a letter at the post office.
questions.hint: 邮寄(post)信件的办公室(office)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我需要去邮局寄一封信。

questions.cn: 黄刀镇没有摩天大楼，但迪拜有无数座。

questions.context_sentence: Basically, every year they build a really big ice castle on the frozen lake.
questions.hint: 卡(ca)在石头里的石头堡垒(castle)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 基本上，他们每年都会在冰冻的湖面上建造一座非常大的冰城堡。

questions.context_sentence: The bus leaves from the bus station.
questions.hint: 公共汽车(bus)停靠的车站(station)。

questions.cn: 公交车从公交车站出发。
